label: Health outcome valuations for EU project appraisal

qaly.label: Value of a Quality-Adjusted Life Year
qaly.context: No single EU-wide QALY value. Range reflects variation across member states. Lower bound typical of Central/Eastern Europe, upper bound typical of Nordic/Western Europe.

daly.label: Value of a Disability-Adjusted Life Year averted
daly.context: Treated symmetrically with QALY for CBA purposes

member_state_examples.description: Some member states have implicit or explicit QALY thresholds from health technology assessment (HTA) bodies.

france.note: No explicit threshold. HAS uses multi-criteria assessment.

source.publication: EC DG Regio CBA Guide; EUnetHTA; OECD Health Working Papers

caveats: The EU does not mandate a single QALY value for CBA
Use the national HTA body threshold if available for the specific member state
For cross-country EU projects, use the midpoint of the range or a GDP-weighted average
